name: Social Commerce Partners Corp
summary: PART I Introduction Social Commerce Partners Corporation (the Company) is a blank check company incorporated on August11, 2025 as a Cayman Islands exempted company and formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses, which we refer to throughout this report as our initial business combination.
